vocab.example: The auditor will visit our office next Monday.
vocab.example_vi: Kiểm toán viên sẽ đến văn phòng chúng tôi vào thứ Hai tới.

vocab.example: Please prepare the financial statements for review.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng chuẩn bị báo cáo tài chính để xem xét.

vocab.example: We need supporting documents for every transaction.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi cần chứng từ hỗ trợ cho mỗi giao dịch.

vocab.example: The auditor found a discrepancy in the accounts.
vocab.example_vi: Kiểm toán viên phát hiện sự chênh lệch trong sổ sách.

vocab.example: Compliance with tax regulations is very important.
vocab.example_vi: Tuân thủ quy định thuế là rất quan trọng.

vocab.example: The auditor will sample a few invoices.
vocab.example_vi: Kiểm toán viên sẽ lấy mẫu một vài hóa đơn.

vocab.example: We keep a clear audit trail for every payment.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi lưu dấu vết kiểm toán rõ ràng cho mỗi khoản thanh toán.

vocab.example: The auditor will sign off once everything matches.
vocab.example_vi: Kiểm toán viên sẽ ký duyệt khi mọi thứ khớp nhau.

lines.speaker: Linh (auditor)
lines.text: Good morning, Minh. I'm the auditor for this year's review.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Good morning. I've prepared the financial statements you requested.

lines.speaker: Linh (auditor)
lines.text: Thank you. Do you also have the supporting documents for these invoices?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Yes, they're all in this folder, organized by month.

lines.speaker: Linh (auditor)
lines.text: I noticed a small discrepancy between the invoice and the bank record.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Let me check. That might be a timing difference from last month.

lines.speaker: Linh (auditor)
lines.text: Okay, please send me proof once you confirm it.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Sure. We take compliance very seriously, so I'll check today.

lines.speaker: Linh (auditor)
lines.text: I'll also sample a few more transactions from last quarter.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No problem. I'll make sure the audit trail is clear for you.

options: A discrepancy between the invoice and the bank record

questions.q: What will Minh do about the discrepancy?

shadowing: The auditor will visit our office to review the accounts.
Please prepare all the financial statements before the audit begins next week.
We need supporting documents for every transaction we made this quarter.
The auditor found a small discrepancy in last month's report.
We keep a clear audit trail for every payment we process.
